7. Create an indicator
Creates a new indicator in ThreatQ.

threatq-create-indicator
Input

!domain domain=www.testdomain.com

7. Create an indicator
Creates a new indicator in ThreatQ.
Base Command
threatq-create-indicator
Input
Argument Name
name: threatq-create-indicator

outputs.description: The ID of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Value The value of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.ID

outputs.description: The source ID of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Source.Name The source name of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Source.ID

outputs.description: The attribute ID of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.Value The attribute value of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.ID

outputs.description: The attribute name of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.CreatedAt Date
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Attribute.Name

outputs.description: ThreatQ.Indicator.UpdatedAt Date The last update date of the indicator.
outputs.name: The creation date of the indicator.

outputs.description: The status of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.TQScore The ThreatQ score of the indicator.
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Status

outputs.description: The description of the indicator. ThreatQ.Indicator.Type
outputs.name: ThreatQ.Indicator.Description
